tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name IN ('github_pull_requests','github_issues') ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT repo, number, title, closes_linear FROM github_pull_requests WHERE state = 'merged' AND closes_linear IS NOT NULL"}

tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"INSERT INTO github_issues (repo, title, state, labels)
SELECT 'acme/web' AS repo,
       'Verify: ' || title AS title,
       'open' AS state,
       NULL AS labels
FROM github_pull_requests
WHERE state = 'merged' AND closes_linear IS NOT NULL"}
